source_predecessor_brief: Replaces cache.db-dependent v0.1 SMOKE_PREVIEW (gitignored 9.3 GB blocker). Per-wallet incremental Goldsky queries · cron-able · full backfill over 13-14 daily runs.
source_delivery_caveat: v0.2 build · accumulating · each cron processes WALLETS_PER_RUN least-recently-updated · full cohort covered over ~14 days · then daily delta only.
caveat: v0.2-full · Goldsky Path A incremental backfill. Source coverage grows daily via build_counterparty_graph_incremental.py cron. Today: 242 of 402 cohort wallets covered with FULL events · remaining 160 fill over the next ~14 daily cron runs.

methodology_changelog.v0.1-smoke \u2192 v0.2-full: Source replaced from SMOKE_PREVIEW (0.22% cohort-tx coverage) to Goldsky Path A FULL incremental backfill (per-wallet OrderFilledEvent stream · maker OR taker · no truncation). Universe size growing daily as cron rotates through cohort.
